---
title: "robust_tests"
author: "ID_234731"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages, include = F}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse) 
library(ggplot2)
library(haven)
library(zoo)
library(stargazer)
library(corrplot)
library(psych)
library(modelsummary)
library(rdrobust)
library(rddtools)
library(fixest)
library(purrr)
library(gt)
library(rddensity)
library(knitr)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(flextable)
library(officer)


```

```{r load data, include = F}

cog_test_sgl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_sgl.rds")

cog_test_svrl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_svrl.rds")


```


# McCrary Density Test

```{r}

cog_test_sgl$age_running <- cog_test_sgl$age - cog_test_sgl$sra

test <- rddensity(cog_test_sgl$age_running, c = 0)

summary(test)


```



```{r}
rdplotdensity(test, cog_test_sgl$age_running, )



results_table <- data.frame(
  Test = "McCrary density test",
  Statistic = round(1.3538, 2),
  `p-value` = round(0.1758, 3)
)

kable(
  results_table,
  align = "lcc",
  caption = "Density discontinuity test at the retirement threshold"
)
```

```{r}
rdplotdensity(
  rdd = test,
  X = cog_test_sgl$age_running,
  
  xlab = "Age relative to statutory retirement age (years)",
  ylab = "Density of observations",
)

#  title = "Density of Age Around the Retirement Threshold"

```
```{r}
library(officer)

doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Figure X: Density of Age Around the Statutory Retirement Age Threshold",
               style = "Normal") |>
  body_add_img(
    src = "density_test_sra.png",
    width = 6,
    height = 4
  ) |>
  body_add_par(
    "Notes: The figure displays the density of the running variable (age relative to the statutory retirement age). The absence of a discontinuity supports the assumption that individuals cannot precisely manipulate their position relative to the cutoff.",
    style = "Normal"
  )

print(doc, target = "density_test_sra.docx")
```





## Covariate Smoothness


```{r}
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

cog_test_sgl$early_dist <- cog_test_sgl$age - cog_test_sgl$early #setting individual cutoffs
cog_test_sgl$sra_dist <- cog_test_sgl$age - cog_test_sgl$sra
cog_test_sgl$weight_sra <- pmax(0,1 - abs(cog_test_sgl$sra_dist) / 5)


covariates <- c("sex", "edu_time", "manual_worker", "married")

results_cov <- data.frame()

for (cov in covariates) {
  tryCatch({
    
    fs_cov <- lm(as.formula(paste(cov,
                   "~ eligible_sra +
                      eligible_sra:sra_dist +
                      sra_dist")),
                 data    = cog_test_sgl,
                 weights = weight_sra)
    
    res <- coeftest(fs_cov, vcov = vcovHC(fs_cov, type = "HC1"))
    
    coef  <- res["eligible_sra",1]
    se    <- res["eligible_sra",2]
    pval  <- res["eligible_sra",4]
    
    mean_below <- weighted.mean(
      cog_test_sgl[[cov]][cog_test_sgl$eligible_sra == 0],
      cog_test_sgl$weight_sra[cog_test_sgl$eligible_sra == 0],
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
    
    results_cov <- rbind(results_cov, data.frame(
      variable = cov,
      coef     = coef,
      se       = se,
      pvalue   = pval,
      mean_below = mean_below
    ))
    
  }, error = function(e) cat("Fehler bei Variable:", cov, "\n"))
}


results_cov <- results_cov %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      pvalue < 0.01 ~ "***",
      pvalue < 0.05 ~ "**",
      pvalue < 0.1  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    coef_se = sprintf("%.3f%s (%.3f)", coef, stars, se)
  )



table_cov <- results_cov %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      pvalue < 0.01 ~ "***",
      pvalue < 0.05 ~ "**",
      pvalue < 0.1  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    estimate = sprintf("%.3f%s", coef, stars),
    se       = sprintf("(%.3f)", se),
    mean_below = sprintf("%.3f", mean_below)
  ) %>%
  select(variable, estimate, se, mean_below) %>%
  rename(
    Variable = variable,
    Estimate = estimate,
    `Std. Error` = se,
    `Mean below cutoff` = mean_below
  )



tab_cov <- flextable(table_cov)

tab_cov <- tab_cov |>
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") |>
  align(j = 2:4, align = "center", part = "all") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "body")

tab_cov <- tab_cov |>
  add_footer_lines(
    "Notes: The table reports discontinuity estimates from local linear regressions of predetermined covariates on the statutory retirement age eligibility indicator. Robust standard errors are shown in parentheses. * p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01."
  ) |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "footer")


doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table X: Covariate Balance at the Statutory Retirement Age Cutoff",
               style = "Normal") |>
  body_add_flextable(tab_cov)

print(doc, target = "covariate_balance_sra.docx")
```


## Non parametric RDD

```{r}

cog_test_sgl$age_running <- cog_test_sgl$age - cog_test_sgl$sra


rd_ant <- rdrobust(
  y = cog_test_sgl$result_ant,
  x = cog_test_sgl$age_running,
  weights = cog_test_sgl$weight_sra
)

rd_sdt <- rdrobust(
  y = cog_test_sgl$result_sdt,
  x = cog_test_sgl$age_running,
  weights = cog_test_sgl$weight_sra
)


results_np <- data.frame(
  Outcome = rep(c("ANT","SDT"), each = 3),
  
  Estimator = rep(
    c("Conventional","Bias-corrected","Robust"),
    2
  ),
  
  Estimate = c(
    rd_ant$coef[1],
    rd_ant$coef[2],
    rd_ant$coef[3],
    
    rd_sdt$coef[1],
    rd_sdt$coef[2],
    rd_sdt$coef[3]
  ),
  
  SE = c(
    rd_ant$se[1],
    rd_ant$se[2],
    rd_ant$se[3],
    
    rd_sdt$se[1],
    rd_sdt$se[2],
    rd_sdt$se[3]
  ),
  
  pvalue = c(
    rd_ant$pv[1],
    rd_ant$pv[2],
    rd_ant$pv[3],
    
    rd_sdt$pv[1],
    rd_sdt$pv[2],
    rd_sdt$pv[3]
  )
)


results_np <- results_np %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      pvalue < 0.01 ~ "***",
      pvalue < 0.05 ~ "**",
      pvalue < 0.1 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    
    Estimate = sprintf("%.3f%s", Estimate, stars),
    SE = sprintf("(%.3f)", SE)
  )

table_np <- results_np %>%
  mutate(Result = paste0(Estimate," ",SE)) %>%
  select(Outcome, Estimator, Result)


tab_np <- flextable(table_np)

tab_np <- tab_np |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "body") |>
  align(j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "all") |>
  align(j = 3, align = "center", part = "all") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all")

tab_np <- tab_np |>
  add_footer_lines(
    "Notes: Non-parametric regression discontinuity estimates using the rdrobust estimator."
  ) |>
  add_footer_lines(
    "The table reports conventional, bias-corrected, and robust estimates with standard errors in parentheses."
  ) |>
  add_footer_lines(
    "* p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01."
  ) |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer")


doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par(
    "Table X: Non-parametric Regression Discontinuity Estimates",
    style = "Normal"
  ) |>
  body_add_flextable(tab_np)

print(doc, target = "rdrobust_results.docx")
```

## Different bandwidths


```{r}

df <- cog_test_sgl %>%
  select(result_ant, result_sdt, long_retired, eligible_sra, age_running)

estimate_models <- function(data, bw){

df_bw <- data %>% 
  filter(abs(age_running) <= bw)

# OLS
ols_ant <- lm(result_ant ~ long_retired, data = df_bw)
ols_sdt <- lm(result_sdt ~ long_retired, data = df_bw)

# First stage
first_stage <- lm(long_retired ~ eligible_sra, data = df_bw)

df_bw$D_hat <- predict(first_stage)

# 2SLS
iv_ant <- lm(result_ant ~ D_hat, data = df_bw)
iv_sdt <- lm(result_sdt ~ D_hat, data = df_bw)

# robust first stage stats
fs_robust <- coeftest(first_stage, vcov = vcovHC(first_stage,"HC1"))

beta_z <- fs_robust["eligible_sra",1]
se_z   <- fs_robust["eligible_sra",2]

kp_F <- (beta_z/se_z)^2

fs_F <- (coef(first_stage)["eligible_sra"] /
         sqrt(vcov(first_stage)["eligible_sra","eligible_sra"]))^2

N <- nrow(df_bw)

return(list(
  models = list(
    "ANT OLS" = ols_ant,
    "SDT OLS" = ols_sdt,
    "ANT 2SLS" = iv_ant,
    "SDT 2SLS" = iv_sdt
  ),
  kp = kp_F,
  fs = fs_F,
  N = N
))
}

bw3 <- estimate_models(df, 3)
bw5 <- estimate_models(df, 5)

models <- list(
  "ANT OLS (3y)" = bw3$models[[1]],
  "SDT OLS (3y)" = bw3$models[[2]],
  "ANT 2SLS (3y)" = bw3$models[[3]],
  "SDT 2SLS (3y)" = bw3$models[[4]],

  "ANT OLS (5y)" = bw5$models[[1]],
  "SDT OLS (5y)" = bw5$models[[2]],
  "ANT 2SLS (5y)" = bw5$models[[3]],
  "SDT 2SLS (5y)" = bw5$models[[4]]
)

vcov_list <- lapply(models, vcovHC, type="HC1")

extra_rows <- data.frame(

term = c("First-stage F","Kleibergen-Paap F","N"),

`ANT OLS (3y)` = c("", "", bw3$N),
`SDT OLS (3y)` = c("", "", bw3$N),
`ANT 2SLS (3y)` = c(round(bw3$fs,2), round(bw3$kp,2), bw3$N),
`SDT 2SLS (3y)` = c(round(bw3$fs,2), round(bw3$kp,2), bw3$N),

`ANT OLS (5y)` = c("", "", bw5$N),
`SDT OLS (5y)` = c("", "", bw5$N),
`ANT 2SLS (5y)` = c(round(bw5$fs,2), round(bw5$kp,2), bw5$N),
`SDT 2SLS (5y)` = c(round(bw5$fs,2), round(bw5$kp,2), bw5$N)

)

tab <- modelsummary(

models,

vcov = vcov_list,

statistic = "({std.error})",

stars = c('*'=0.1,'**'=0.05,'***'=0.01),

coef_rename = c(
  "long_retired" = "Retired",
  "D_hat" = "Retired"
),

gof_omit = "AIC|BIC|Log|Adj",

add_rows = extra_rows,

output = "flextable"

)

tab <- tab |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "header") |>
  hline_bottom(border = fp_border(width = 1.5), part = "body") |>
  align(align = "center", part = "body") |>
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "all") |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") |>
  add_footer_lines(
"Notes: OLS and 2SLS estimates using bandwidths of 3 and 5 years around the statutory retirement age. Robust standard errors in parentheses. ANT = Animal Naming Test, SDT = Symbol Digit Test."
  ) |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer")

doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_flextable(tab)

print(doc, target = "bandwidth_robustness_ols_iv.docx")

```
